prompt: Line comparison: the big blind continues after facing an early-position open. Compared with all hands before the open, classify the continuing range width.
why_v1: Narrower means the player has filtered out many hands before continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The continuing big blind range is narrower because facing an early open removes many weak hands.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This continuing range is narrower because not every possible hand remains after an early open.
